title: Office fit-out Project Engineers/Managers
description:
Kenyon provides multi-trade services to the Bio-pharmaceutical industry, semiconductor plants, ultra-high purity gas industry and for high-end corporation fitting-out projects.

Our annual gross revenue is in excess of S$200 million and we have more than 500 staff in Singapore.

Kenyon Pte Ltd is located at the

Kenyon Building

, No. 8 Loyang Crescent, Singapore 509016.

Website : www.kenyon.com.sg

Job Description

● Permanent Position

● 5.5 Days work week (9am – 6pm) [May require to work on weekends

when necessary]

● Loyang Crescent (may be required to be stationed at site office around

Singapore CBD area or island wide)

● Salary depending on working experience + Performance Bonus (Please

state expected monthly salary)

Responsibilities:

● Manage all projects matters and workers

● Able to coordinate with clients, consultants, landlords, equipment

vendors and sub-contractors

● Able to prepare permit-to-work, risk assessment and other necessary

project documents

● Support projects from pre-contract through to completion, ensuring that

work is done within budget

● Able to analyse tender, technical specifications and contract documents

and possess high ability in negotiation

● Monitor project costing and progress payment, variation works and cost

control

● Prepare plans and documents for quotations to suppliers that can be

used as a basis for pricing

● Prepare and follow up on request for quotations from materials or

equipment suppliers/sub-contractors

● Assist to prepare price comparison, costing summary and technical

proposal in order to prepare tender submission

● Attend project meetings with clients and consultants

Requirements:

● Relevant degree/ diploma / Certificate in Building, M&E or equivalent

● Singapore & Malaysia Citizens and PR(PR includes other countries).

● Current Employment Pass and S Pass holders

● 3 years relevant experience in M&E commercial office fit-out industry,

Candidates who have longer experiences can apply for senior position

● Good working knowledge of forms / condition of contract

● Meticulous and attention to details

● Team player with excellent people communication skills

● Good computer skills such as MS Project and Office

● Strong negotiation skills

postedCompany.description:
Kenyon Pte Ltd was founded in 1988 to undertake mechanical and electrical (M&E) projects for chemical and petrochemical process companies. Over the years, we have consolidated our experiences and expertise and moved into more capital and knowledge intensive projects. We have also established regional offices in China, in Suzhou, Chengdu and Tianjin, to support our growing operations there.

Today, our group includes more than 150 experienced engineers and designers undertaking projects incorporate renovation, M&E works, and high-purity piping. Our client includes banks, trading houses, electronic industry, life sciences, chemical plants and special high purity gas industries with a focus in corporate renovation and bio-pharmaceutical plant construction. Kenyon also fabricates pharmaceutical modular process skids, ultra high purity gas blending panels and manufactures ETFE coated ducts and dampers.

Kenyon aims to be a one-stop solutions provider for all its clients’ engineering needs.

We currently have a staff in excess of 900, half in Singapore and the remainder in our 3 Chinese offices in Suzhou, Chengdu and Tianjin.
postedCompany.name: KENYON PTE. LTD.
